name: Gbolahan Oluseun Akerele
bio: Gbolahan O. Akerele is a seasoned transport and logistics professional with over fifteen years of experience spanning international maritime logistics, shipping, rail, and road transportation. He currently serves as Head of Operations (Transport & Logistics) at McMoren MultiServices Limited, where he provides strategic direction, oversees operational performance, and drives efficiency across logistics and transport functions. A Chartered Fellow of the Chartered Institute of Logistics and Transport (CILT) Nigeria and a certified practitioner of CILT, United Kingdom, he is widely recognized for his analytical expertise and practical industry insight. His career includes significant experience with multinational organisations and complex projects, through which he has developed strong capabilities in shipping operations, transport systems, and integrated supply chain solutions. In addition to his corporate role, he is actively engaged in professional leadership and institutional development, contributing to policy dialogue, capacity building, and the advancement of the transport and logistics sector. He holds a Master of Science in Transport Management from Lagos State University and both Master’s and Bachelor’s degrees in Transport and Logistics from Ladoke Akintola University of Technology.
responsibilities: Strategic direction for all transport and logistics operations
Overseeing operational performance and tracking KPIs
Driving efficiency across maritime, rail, and road logistics
Managing complex supply chain solutions and multinational projects
Contributing to professional leadership and policy dialogue in the sector

name: Ronke Akerele-Adu
bio:
Ronke Akerele-Adu oversees end-to-end production, quality assurance, and operational coordination across both divisions. She brings proven expertise in managing creative and technical teams, optimizing workflows, and ensuring the consistent delivery of high-quality products that meet client expectations. Her role combines strategic oversight with hands-on execution, contributing significantly to operational excellence and business growth.

She has developed her expertise through engagements with international organisations, as well as participation in world-class creative events and projects, shaping her innovative and quality-driven approach.

Ronke Akerele-Adu received professional training from Elder Berry Couture and is a certified fashion instructor accredited by First Technical University, Ibadan. She holds a Bachelor’s degree in Agricultural Economics from Ladoke Akintola University of Technology.
responsibilities: End-to-end production and quality assurance for creative divisions
Managing technical and creative teams for optimal workflows
Strategic oversight and hands-on execution of fashion products
Ensuring consistent delivery of high-quality craftsmanship
Liaising on world-class creative events and international projects

name: Rasaq Ajibade
bio:
A dedicated and results-oriented Fleet Maintenance Manager with over 10 years of hands-on experience in fleet maintenance operations. Known for a strong work ethic and a proactive, selfless approach to ensuring optimal vehicle performance and operational efficiency.

Skilled in implementing effective maintenance strategies, reducing downtime, and managing resources to support seamless logistics and transportation operations.
responsibilities: Inventory & Cost Control
Fleet Uptime & Availability
Preventive & Predictive Maintenance
Safety & Regulatory Compliance
Maintenance Logs, Data Tracking, and Reporting
Strong and Sustainable Relationships with Vendors and Market Stakeholders

name: Segun Banji
bio:
A results-driven Data Analyst and Digital Consultant with a degree in Statistics and over 7 years of experience specializing in business intelligence and logistics optimization. Proven expertise in leveraging data-driven tools and analytical techniques to enhance operational efficiency, streamline logistics processes, and support strategic decision-making.

Certified in Data Analytics with credentials from Cisco Networking Academy, Dataleum, Sololearn, and SkillAhead Academy, reflecting a strong commitment to continuous learning and professional excellence.
responsibilities: Monitoring and optimizing truck movement to ensure timely and efficient deliveries
Conducting in-depth data analysis to improve logistics and supply chain efficiency
Coordinating digital systems for seamless logistics operations
Tracking performance metrics and developing KPI reports for continuous improvement
Providing data-driven decision support for route planning and resource allocation
Managing fleet real-time tracking systems for enhanced visibility and control

name: Adu Victoria
bio:
Adu Victoria is a creative and versatile fashion designer specializing in designs for both men and women. She is also a dedicated fashion trainer and talent development expert, known for identifying and nurturing emerging creatives within the fashion industry.

A graduate of McAdur Imaginations Fashion Academy, Victoria has further strengthened her expertise through additional training and certifications from reputable institutions. Her solid educational background, combined with years of hands-on industry experience, has positioned her as both an organizer and active participant in numerous fashion and business events.

Victoria is passionate about excellence, creativity, and empowering individuals to build successful and sustainable careers in fashion.
responsibilities: Aso Ebi & Bespoke Bridal Wear
Corporate Dress Design
Pattern Making & Fashion Detailing
Fashion Styling
Talent Mentoring
Fashion Training

name: Mustapha Shade Monsurat
bio:
Monsurat is a seasoned Customs Broker with over seven years of professional experience, serving as a strategic staff of the McMoren MultiServices Limited. She leads the company’s Customs Brokerage division, overseeing the smooth and compliant clearance of import and export cargoes across Nigerian ports.

Under her leadership, the team ensures accurate preparation and processing of shipping documentation, including Bills of Lading and customs declarations, classification of goods for tariff purposes, and assessment of duties and taxes. Mustapha liaises seamlessly with shipping lines, customs authorities, and regulatory agencies, providing expert guidance on trade compliance, risk management, and regulatory adherence. She also coordinates cargo inspection procedures and negotiates with stakeholders to resolve operational challenges, ensuring timely and efficient clearance of shipments.
responsibilities: Smooth and compliant clearance of import and export cargoes
Preparation of shipping documents and customs declarations
Classification of goods for tariff purposes and duty assessment
Liaison with shipping lines, customs authorities, and regulatory agencies
Coordination of cargo inspection and operational challenge resolution
Expert guidance on trade compliance and risk management

name: Bello Lanre Kazeem
bio:
Bello Kazeem is an experienced freight forwarding professional with expertise in the oil and gas sector, containerized and general cargo, and import and export freight. He brings extensive knowledge in cargo haulage, end-to-end logistics, customs clearance, and the specialized handling of oversized and heavy shipments.

He oversees McMoren MultiServices Limited’s freight operations, including sea and road transportation for inland distribution, and manages customs clearance, regulatory compliance, warehousing, and inventory. Bello also provides door-to-door solutions and tailored project cargo services, ensuring timely, cost-effective, and reliable delivery. His leadership reinforces the company’s reputation as a trusted, client-focused logistics partner.

Kazeem has received professional training and certifications from leading educational and corporate institutions and holds a B.Sc. in Banking & Finance from Ekiti State University.
responsibilities: Oversight of freight operations including sea and road transportation
Management of customs clearance and regulatory compliance
Specialized handling of oversized and heavy shipments
Warehousing and inventory management
Providing door-to-door solutions and project cargo services
